title: Grow A Crop
description: this mod will have loads of new crops and will later have tools and more features
body: this is a mod that not really adds in a ton but can mainly be used in a series i will be doing were you can just play minecraft in a cozy way. with new decoration blocks and loads of new crops! this mod is still in development so if you have feedback or suggestions, feel free to join my discord server and ask me there!
